title: Slovakian Takrai Chicken Tacos
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of Slovakia and Thailand with the classic Mexican dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the lemongrass and takrai to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped onions to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the chicken mixture onto a tortilla and topping with cheese, sour cream, and any desired toppings.
